case_title: TD AMERITRADE, INC. VS. MIGUEL MONTEJANO
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-18-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO MARCH-18-2025 HEARING RE: PETITIONER TD AMERITRADE, INC.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM FINRA-DR ARBITRATION AWARD; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER TD AMERITRADE, INC.'s Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. Moving party shall submit a proposed judgment.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
